spot_checks_performed: probe-results.json raw response verification (Path C failures confirmed)

findings.decision_validation: Empirical data decisively favors Path B (/api/chat) for role classification. Path C (daemon) failure modes (prose output, 'AI' stubs) are documented in raw JSON. The 23s overhead claim was successfully refuted with 1.7-1.8s measured IPC+inference wall clock.
findings.router_quality: New router.py implementation is idiomatic and safe. Use of substring matching in _match_category provides behavioral continuity while server-side templates improve precision.
findings.migration_cleanliness: Nemoclaw migration preserves session value while offloading obsolete classification logic. Deprecation of nemotron_client.py is clearly documented.
findings.carry_forwards: F001 (cascade flake) and F005 (checkpoint corruption) are legitimate pre-existing issues. F003 (remaining G083 sites in OpenClaw path) is correctly scoped out of W3.

recommendation: W3 validated. W4 cross-model cascade integration may proceed. Nemoclaw daemon should be restarted before W4 to pick up migrated classification path.
